meaning: n.[植]三叶草(爱尔兰的国花),红(或白)三叶草,天蓝,天蓝苜蓿
examples: The lace design incorporated rose, thistle, daffodil, and shamrock—the emblems of England, Scotland, Wales and Northern Ireland.
Your shamrock necklace? Cindy, I can't wear this.
Lonely shamrock and orange. Also appears to be silent cry.
After 23 weeks, Shamrock says, sales of the drink were 18% higher in Phoenix than in Tucson.
It's creamy, long-lasting head is so thick, you can trace a shamrock in it with your finger.
